description.value:
You manipulate your soul to defeat your enemies or protect your allies through soul manipulation spells. Soul manipulation spells are a type of focus spell which can only be used against the target of your @UUID[Compendium.aedenir-homebrew.aed-abilities.Item.59yhhHJv7XqG66bE]{See Soul} ability or allies whose souls you have seen during daily preparation. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for soul manipulation spells. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point wby spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to meditate or relax.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

You gain your choice of one soul manipulation spell from these initial soul manipulation spells:

@UUID[Compendium.aedenir-homebrew.aed-spells.Item.t7HKJb7JmPUIGKeq]{Soul Knife}

@UUID[Compendium.aedenir-homebrew.aed-spells.Item.Wrzl30KzRUOU2ubu]{Inner Bulwark}

@UUID[Compendium.aedenir-homebrew.aed-spells.Item.IQOvSicPXl4VQJ73]{Radiant Soul}
